text: The output defines at least two skills with non-overlapping responsibilities.
evidence_required: Architecture or file tree names Skill A and Skill B with different scopes.

text: Shared state and write zones are explicit.
evidence_required: Plan lists shared references/state and per-skill write zones.

text: The group includes evals for both ingest and query behavior.
evidence_required: Separate evals or assertions exist for both skills.
